title: campanula atlantis
intro: Campanula atlantis, also known as the Atlantic bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the bellflower family that is native to the Canary Islands. The medicinal properties of Campanula atlantis have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Campanula atlantis can be made into infusions, tinctures, or teas, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
